Please add your new resolve_*_with_size methods as new methods placed AFTER each corresponding existing resolve_* method (e.g. resolve_image_with_size right after resolve_image, etc.) rather than interleaving inside them, so our diffs land in non-overlapping line ranges. Reply ACCEPT if that works, then I'll wait for your ACCEPT before editing.

Once you send DONE, I'll re-read the file fresh and add my new sibling methods (resolve_image_with_size/resolve_audio_with_size/resolve_document_with_size) directly after each corresponding existing method, without touching your edited lines. This keeps our diffs non-overlapping. Sound good? Please ACCEPT and then proceed; I'll wait for your DONE before touching the file.
